iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 45% (stable). Day 24 Hour 13 UTC. CRITICAL. Dimona/Arad 120+ injured from Iranian missiles. No new nuclear-specific events. Diplomacy contested (Iran denies). IAEA still sidelined. Updated 2026-03-23T13:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 24 Hour 13 UTC. IMMINENT. Iran DENIES negotiations (Fars: 'no direct or indirect contact'), says Trump 'backed down.' Diplomacy track contested. Fresh UAE missile/drone interception. Israel cancels classes nationwide. 120+ injured Dimona/Arad. 5-day window fragile. Updated 2026-03-23T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Starmer-Trump discuss need to open Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: UK PM Starmer and Trump discuss need to reopen Strait of Hormuz. UK-EU-Gulf joint statement on 'appropriate efforts' for safe passage.

latest_news.headline: Gulf states UAE/Bahrain join Hormuz coalition statement with EU
latest_news.text: UAE Foreign Minister: 'we will never be blackmailed by terrorists.' UAE and Bahrain sign joint statement with European leaders expressing readiness to contribute to Hormuz reopening efforts. Gulf aligning firmly with US.

latest_news.headline: Israel warns 'several more weeks' of fighting against Iran
latest_news.text: IDF says preparing for 'several more weeks of fighting against Iran and Hezbollah' — open-ended war commitment.

latest_news.headline: FTSE drops 2% to 9,706 — lowest since December
latest_news.text: FTSE 100 down over 2% to 9,706. European markets following Asian rout. DAX, CAC also down ~2%.

latest_news.headline: Oman FM: US has 'lost control of its foreign policy'
latest_news.text: Oman FM writes in Economist that US has 'lost control of its foreign policy' — urges all parties back to negotiating table. Oman lone regional mediator critical of US.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 77% (stable). Day 24 Hour 13 UTC. IMMINENT. Ground expansion continues. Lebanese houses near border ordered demolished by IDF. IRGC commanding Hezbollah confirmed. No ceasefire progress. Updated 2026-03-23T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 12 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO Patriot batteries active. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 39% (up). Day 24 Hour 13 UTC. CRITICAL. Spring-summer 2026 offensive confirmed by CNN/ISW. 8000+ weekly Russian losses. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil boost helping Russia. Updated 2026-03-23T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: CNN confirms: Russian forces begin spring-summer 2026 offensive
latest_news.text: CNN: Russia begins anticipated spring-summer offensive against Ukrainian Fortress Belt. Syrskyi: 'stepped up pressure across several sections of the front.' Sloviansk/Kramatorsk directions.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 45% (up). Day 24 Hour 13 UTC. CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire expires midnight Mar 24 (~11hrs). No extension. Pakistan FM vows to 'eradicate terrorism.' Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan FM vows to 'eradicate terrorism' as Afghan ceasefire nears end
latest_news.text: Pakistan FM says committed to 'eradicate the menace of terrorism' as Eid ceasefire expires midnight March 24. No extension signal. Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain.

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of mortar fire during Eid ceasefire - 1 killed. ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Fraying badly.

top_signals: IRAN DENIES NEGOTIATIONS: Fars News says 'no direct or indirect contact' - contradicts Trump
TRUMP POSTPONED STRIKES 5 DAYS: 'Productive conversations' claimed - but Iran calls it spin
IRAN THREATENS COMPLETE HORMUZ CLOSURE: if US strikes power plants
FRESH UAE INTERCEPTION: Iranian missiles/drones intercepted over UAE today
OIL CRASHED 14%: Brent $96, WTI $84 on (disputed) diplomacy hopes
ISRAEL CANCELS ALL CLASSES: nationwide school shutdown Sun/Mon after Dimona/Arad strikes
IRAQ PM ACCELERATING US COALITION WITHDRAWAL - major regional shift
RUSSIA-UKRAINE: Spring-summer offensive confirmed, 8000+ weekly losses
PAKISTAN-CEASEFARE: Expires midnight Mar 24, no extension, escalation near-certain
5-DAY WINDOW: Ends March 28 - make-or-break. Iran says Trump 'backed down.'

new: TRUMP-IRAN DIPLOMACY: 'Productive conversations' — first direct talks since war began
TRUMP POSTPONES STRIKES: 5-day delay on power plant strikes, subject to talks success
IRAN CLAIMS TRUMP 'BACKED DOWN' — diplomatic spin to claim leverage
ISRAEL-LEBANON: Hezbollah record 63 operations, ground campaign expanding
RUSSIA-UKRAINE: 8,000+ Russian losses this week per Zelensky — offensive grinding
zone_changes: iran_conventional: IMMINENT -> CRITICAL (downgrade — ultimatum replaced by 5-day talks window)
iran_conventional: iran_rejects_dialogue signal should be deprecated in favor of diplomacy_active
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION: Trump delays power plant strikes 5 days for talks. First diplomatic channel with Tehran. However, fighting continues on all fronts. Hormuz still blocked. 5-day window is fragile.

latest_news.headline: IRAN DENIES NEGOTIATIONS: Fars News (IRGC) says 'no direct or indirect contact' with Trump
latest_news.text: IRGC-affiliated Fars News denies any Iran-US contact. Iran FM says Trump's statements 'to reduce energy prices and buy time to implement military plans.' Diplomatic track now contested.

latest_news.headline: Iran military threatens Hormuz 'complete closure' if US strikes power plants
latest_news.text: Iran's military declares Strait of Hormuz will be 'completely closed' if Trump acts on power plant threats. Retaliation includes targeting US-linked regional infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts fresh Iranian missile and drone strike
latest_news.text: UAE Ministry of Defence confirms intercepting missiles and drones launched from Iran. 'Sounds heard are the result of air defence systems.'

latest_news.headline: Israel cancels all in-person classes nationwide Sun/Mon
latest_news.text: Education Minister Kisch orders no frontal learning for Sunday/Monday after Dimona/Arad strikes. Situation assessment before Tuesday. 120+ injured in strikes.

latest_news.headline: Trump extends Hormuz deadline, claims 'productive conversations' with Tehran
latest_news.text: Trump postpones power plant strikes 5 days. Iran denies contact. Contradictory messaging from both sides.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 13:04 UTC). DIPLOMACY TRACK CONTESTED: Iran denies any contact with Trump, calls statements spin to 'buy time.' Trump claims 'productive conversations.' Fresh UAE interception. Israel cancels classes nationwide. 5-day window (ends Mar 28) fragile — if Iran truly isn't talking, window is theater. Pakistan ceasefire expires in ~11hrs. Russia-Ukraine spring offensive confirmed. IEA: worst energy crisis since 1970s.
de_escalation_watch: FRAGILE PARTIAL: Trump postponed strikes 5 days but Iran denies negotiations exist. Diplomatic track may be unilateral US claim. Iran continues military operations (fresh UAE strikes). Hormuz still blocked. 5-day window fragile — if no real talks, escalation resumes Mar 28.
